chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 13 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 23.11.2023 Petitioner Ghulam Sarwar Ghunio, present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along Imdad Ali Larik, Focal Person of Director School Education (ES&HS), Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner is a High School Teacher (HST), has filed this petition as Director School Education, Elementary, Secondary & Higher Secondary, Sukkur (respondent No.2) is not deciding his application for promotion since 2018. Learned AAG submits that petitioner’s number was at serial No.41 of the seniority list, and since there were only 40 promotional posts, they all were promoted. However, in the next meeting of Departmental Promotion Committee, the petitioner would be considered. The focal person of respondent No.2, present in Court, undertakes that application of the petitioner for promotion would be decided within a period of fifteen days and the decision would be communicated to him. The petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
